channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Video: Man Sentenced in Cold Case Murders Solved Using Chewing Gum
item.description: Mitchell Gaff was sentenced to 50 years to life in prison for the murders of two women in the 1980s.

item.title: Bipartisan U.S.-Mexico congressional caucus launches amid diplomatic strain
item.description: The launch is backed by the American Mexican Leadership Council, a new national group also debuting Thursday to highlight Mexican American...

item.title: Some parents don't want their kids to use tech at school. But districts are pushing back
item.description: Parents nationwide concerned about excessive screen time in schools are urging educators to return to pencils and paper.

item.title: Border Patrol chief Michael Banks is stepping down
item.description: Michael Banks, the head of U.S. Border Patrol, is resigning.
